rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assign statements in implementation scope only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Component type contracts should use visible inputs and outputs to define assumptions and guarantees
Implementation contracts may include assignments for subcomponent bindings when needed
AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and scoped to their component's declaration
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions
Constants and equations are declared with type annotations in component type scopes
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
